phrases.intent_en: One ticket for the Palais du Tau, please.
phrases.text_local: Un billet pour le Palais du Tau, s'il vous plaît.
phrases.pronunciation: un bee-YEH poor luh pah-LAY dew TOH, seel voo PLAY
phrases.cultural_note: The Palais du Tau was the Archbishop's palace and where kings feasted after their coronation. Now a museum with original cathedral sculptures and coronation treasures.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the talisman of Charlemagne?
phrases.text_local: Où est le talisman de Charlemagne ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh luh tah-lees-MON duh shar-luh-MAHN
phrases.cultural_note: The museum holds the famous Talisman of Charlemagne — a reliquary pendant said to have contained a fragment of the True Cross, worn around his neck.

responses.english: In the treasury room, on the first floor.
responses.phonetic: dahn lah SAHL doo tray-ZOR oh pruh-MYAY ay-TAHZH
responses.french: Dans la salle du trésor, au premier étage.

phrases.intent_en: Can we book the tower visit here?
phrases.text_local: On peut réserver la visite des tours ici ?
phrases.pronunciation: on puh ray-zair-VAY lah vee-ZEET day TOOR ee-SEE
phrases.cultural_note: Tower visits to the cathedral are organised through the Palais du Tau. Book here or in advance online.

responses.english: No, it is at the cathedral ticket desk.
responses.phonetic: nohn say toh gee-SHAY duh lah kah-tay-DRAHL
responses.french: Non, c'est au guichet de la cathédrale.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the royal coronation treasures are displayed
phrases.text_local: Où sont exposés les trésors royaux du sacre ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo son eks-poh-ZAY lay tray-ZOR rwah-YOH doo SAHKR
phrases.cultural_note: The Palais du Tau, former residence of the Archbishops of Reims, holds the coronation regalia and tapestries used during French royal coronations.

responses.english: In the Salle du Tau, on the ground floor.
responses.phonetic: dahn lah SAL doo TOH, oh ray-duh-shoh-SAY.
responses.french: Dans la salle du Tau, au rez-de-chaussée.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if entry is included with a cathedral ticket
phrases.text_local: Le Palais du Tau est-il compris avec le billet de la cathédrale ?
phrases.pronunciation: luh pah-LAY doo TOH ay-TEEL com-PREE ah-VEK luh bee-YAY duh lah kah-tay-DRAL
